name: Elkridge MD, USA

rent.notes: Howard County — affluent commuter suburb between DC and Baltimore. Cheaper than Columbia/Ellicott City but premium for MD. Newer townhome developments along US-1 corridor.

groceries.notes: Wegmans, Giant, Whole Foods, Harris Teeter. Slightly above Baltimore but similar to Annapolis.

utilities.notes: BGE electric + Washington Gas + Howard County DPW water/sewer.

healthcare.notes: Medicare baseline. Howard County General Hospital (Johns Hopkins affiliate), UM Baltimore Washington Medical Center 15 min. Direct Johns Hopkins access 20 min.

transportation.notes: MARC (Maryland Area Regional Commuter) Camden Line at Dorsey/Savage stations to DC Union Station (~45 min). Interstate 95 corridor. BWI (Baltimore-Washington International) Airport 10 min. Capital Beltway access.

entertainment.notes: Patapsco Valley State Park, Arundel Mills shopping, Blob's Park. Cable+1Gig typical (Comcast/Xfinity, Verizon Fios).

miscellaneous.notes: HOA (homeowners association) common in townhome communities. Interstate 95 + ICC (Intercounty Connector toll road) tolls. Howard County piggyback 3.20%.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile. Excellent specialist access: Johns Hopkins (20 min), Howard County General (Hopkins affiliate), UM BWMC (University of Maryland Baltimore Washington Medical Center).

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from MD + Howard County brackets.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Howard County, MD). Maryland Health Connection: CareFirst, Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: MD pension exclusion up to ~$39K for retirees 65+; SS fully exempt. Combined MD state + Howard County piggyback (3.20% — tied for highest in MD).

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Maryland has no vehicle personal property tax.

taxes.notes: MD tax benefits (Social Security exempt, pension exclusion, no vehicle tax). Howard County piggyback 3.20% tied for highest in MD.

healthcare.notes: Exceptional healthcare access: Howard County General (Johns Hopkins affiliate), UM Baltimore Washington Medical Center, full Johns Hopkins system 20 min. One of best healthcare-access locations in the region.

acaMarketplace.notes: Maryland Health Connection: CareFirst, Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare. Howard County rating area — competitive marketplace.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Patapsco Valley State Park trails, Arundel Mills mega-mall, Live! Casino. Strong Howard County schools reputation. Diverse demographics. BWI (Baltimore-Washington International) Airport 10 min.

pros: MD tax benefits: Social Security exempt, pension exclusion, no vehicle personal property tax
Exceptional healthcare access (Johns Hopkins + UM within 20 min)
MARC (Maryland Area Regional Commuter) Camden Line to DC (~45 min)
BWI (Baltimore-Washington International) Airport 10 min — easy regional + international flights
Central between DC + Baltimore — access to both metros

cons.text: Howard County piggyback 3.20% — tied for highest in MD
Interstate 95 traffic can be brutal; Capital Beltway worse
Affluent area — premium pricing on services
Limited walkable core (car-dependent outside MARC corridor)
~40 mi from Fairfax — further than closer VA alternatives
Safety & crime: see cited reports for current figures by city and country
